A green-skinned individual was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''Jedi''' who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], this individual received [[Jedi training/Legends|instruction]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Reporting to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], this Jedi took up the rank of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and accepted missions from the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]].<ref name="TB" />

The Jedi was placed in command of a Jedi-[[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] task force created to investigate the mysteriously abandoned [[Space station/Legends|space station]] known as the ''[[Brink of the Celestial Wake]]''. Boarding the station, the Jedi and clones were quickly [[Mission to the Brink of the Celestial Wake|attacked]] by mass amounts of [[pink blob]]s and all perished excluding Jedi [[Serra Keto]]. When Jedi [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] received Keto's distress code, he boarded the ship and found the body of the unfortunate Jedi task force leader. His body would be destroyed when the space station was destroyed by the combined efforts of the two surviving Jedi.<ref name="TB" />

A green-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], this deceased Jedi belonged to a species which had three-fingers on each hand, and two curving cranial horns which sprouted from the back of his head.

==Behind the scenes==
The Jedi was created by the [[Fillbach Brothers]], a pencillers of ''[[The Brink]]'', a story in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4|fourth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Clone Wars Adventures'']] line.
